--- Page 1 ---

MASTER SERVICE AGREEMENT

This Master Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of June 1, 2022
by and between Target Company, Inc. ("Provider") and Global Analytics Group
("Customer").

1. TERM
This Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue for a period of
two (2) years unless earlier terminated.

--- Page 2 ---

2. FEES
Customer shall pay an annual license fee of $180,000.

3. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
In no event shall either party's aggregate liability exceed the total fees paid
by Customer during the twelve (12) month period preceding the claim.

4. CHANGE OF CONTROL
Upon a Change of Control of Provider, this Agreement shall continue in full force
and effect; provided that Customer may request a review of pricing terms within
ninety (90) days of the Change of Control event.
